task: Move the red pepper to the right of the blue spoon
raw:
Scene: red_pepper, blue_spoon, green_cloth, metal_bowl, stove
Step 1: reach(red_pepper)
  affordance_region: the red pepper in the metal bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_pepper, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_pepper) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_pepper)
  affordance_region: the red body of the red pepper
  contact: holding(red_pepper) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_pepper)
Step 3: transport(red_pepper -> right_of_blue_spoon)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the right of the blue spoon
  spatial: above(red_pepper, stove, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_pepper)
  done_when: above(red_pepper, stove, 0.05)
Step 4: place(red_pepper -> right_of_blue_spoon)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the right of the blue spoon
  contact: surface_contact(red_pepper, stove) [completion]; released(red_pepper) [completion]
  pose: stable(red_pepper) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(red_pepper, stove) AND released(red_pepper) AND stable(red_pepper)
<END_OF_PLAN>
